title: Skillet Chicken Schnitzel
description: A German-inspired dish featuring crispy chicken schnitzel made with a creamy Thai-inspired sauce. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: 1. Season the chicken breasts with salt and pepper.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, eggs, and panko breadcrumbs.
3. Dip each chicken breast in the flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
4. Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the coated chicken breasts to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
6. Transfer the cooked chicken to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
7. In the same skillet, add the creamy Thai sauce and chicken broth, whisking until smooth.
8. Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
9. Serve the chicken breasts with the creamy Thai sauce spooned over the top.
